raw_response: The Anker Nano 67W charger is an excellent choice for your travel needs due to its compact and foldable design, making it easy to carry in a pocket or bag. Despite being price-sensitive, you can still appreciate the high-quality build with GaN technology for fast charging. Although it doesn't include cables and gets warm under full load, its dual USB-C ports offer versatile charging options for multiple devices simultaneously.
